tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: Laboratory results are largely within normal limits. Mildly decreased creatinine is not clinically significant in this context. Slightly low total CO₂ may suggest mild metabolic acidosis or compensation but should be interpreted with clinical context. No evidence of hyperglycemia or renal dysfunction. Overall, no acute laboratory abnormalities detected.

text.div: Provider Organization: Detská fakultná nemocnica s poliklinikou Banská Bystrica

name.value: Detská fakultná nemocnica s poliklinikou Banská Bystrica

text.div: Provenance for SYNDERAI Synthetic Example Data Resource
Laboratory: Laboratoire Central Européenne, 1000 Brussels, Belgium
